title: New mayor for Knysna
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna municipality has a new...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News","html":"Breaking News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna municipality has a new mayor, Thando Matika, an ANC proportional representation councillor.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna municipality has a new mayor, Thando Matika, an ANC proportional representation councillor."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Matika was elected today Friday 28 February and replaces former mayor Aubrey Tsengwa who was ousted last week in a motion of no confidence brought by EFF councillor Neil Louw."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The DA did not put a candidate, so there was no vote.","html":"The DA did not put a candidate, so there was no vote."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in next weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in next weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
